raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1976 requires Cal-OSHA to develop regulations mandating that all workplaces in California have naloxone nasal spray in their first aid kits.",
    "Naloxone nasal spray can completely reverse a deadly opioid overdose.",
    "More than half of the counterfeit prescription pills trafficked across the U.S. now contain a potentially deadly dose of fentanyl.",
    "Fentanyl's increased accessibility compared to naloxone correlates with an increase in overdose deaths.",
    "AB 1976 will increase the accessibility of naloxone in California workplaces.",
    "California is poised to become a world leader in access to naloxone as a result of AB 1976."
  ]
}
```
